benefits.description: Stomach ulcers resolved, putrid/rotting flesh breath completely subsided after several weeks of use
Previously used for mental and physical healing related to drug abuse; noted benefit early on but diminished over time

protocol_notes: OP reconstituted 5mg BPC-157 with BAC water. Dose calculated at 25mcg/IU, 10 IU per dose = 250mcg (described as 300mcg in post). Used oral route (swallowed/shot down gullet). Has used BPC-157 off and on for several years. Bad breath had persisted for ~1 year prior. Tested resolution by consuming energy drinks which previously worsened symptoms.
